code_symbol_inventory_fetch_files_for_re.postgresqlSql: SELECT file_row.code_file_id, file_row.relative_path, file_row.sha256, file_row.line_count, file_row.symbol_count, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory.code_symbols AS sym WHERE sym.code_file_id = file_row.code_file_id AND (sym.metadata_json IS NULL OR sym.symbol_hash IS NULL OR sym.signature IS NULL OR sym.visibility IS NULL OR sym.layer_code IS NULL OR sym.domain_code IS NULL)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS needs_semantic_backfill FROM inventory.code_files AS file_row WHERE file_row.code_repository_id = %s::uuid
code_symbol_inventory_fetch_files_for_re.sqlServerSql: SELECT file_row.code_file_id, file_row.relative_path, file_row.sha256, file_row.line_count, file_row.symbol_count, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory.code_symbols AS sym WHERE sym.code_file_id = file_row.code_file_id AND (sym.metadata_json IS NULL OR sym.symbol_hash IS NULL OR sym.signature IS NULL OR sym.visibility IS NULL OR sym.layer_code IS NULL OR sym.domain_code IS NULL)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS needs_semantic_backfill FROM inventory.code_files AS file_row WHERE file_row.code_repository_id = ?

code_symbol_inventory_delete_file_symbol.postgresqlSql: DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_symbol_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]); DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_symbol_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]); UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET source_symbol_id = NULL WHERE source_symbol_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]); UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET target_symbol_id = NULL WHERE target_symbol_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]); DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_symbol_id = ANY(%s::uuid[])
code_symbol_inventory_delete_file_symbol.sqlServerSql: DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_symbol_id IN (?); DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_symbol_id IN (?); UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET source_symbol_id = NULL WHERE source_symbol_id IN (?); UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET target_symbol_id = NULL WHERE target_symbol_id IN (?); DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_symbol_id IN (?)

code_symbol_inventory_fetch_symbol_ids_f.postgresqlSql: SELECT code_symbol_id FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id = %s::uuid
code_symbol_inventory_fetch_symbol_ids_f.sqlServerSql: SELECT code_symbol_id FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id = ?

code_symbol_inventory_insert_symbols_bat.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS r(code_symbol_id uuid, code_file_id uuid, symbol_name text, qualified_name text, symbol_kind text, line_number integer, end_line_number integer, container_name text, metadata_json jsonb, symbol_hash text, signature text, visibility text, layer_code text, domain_code text, parent_symbol_id uuid, is_entry_point boolean, is_exported boolean, is_abstract boolean, enrichment_status text)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_symbols (code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status) SELECT code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status FROM rows
code_symbol_inventory_insert_symbols_bat.sqlServerSql: /* SQL Server parity can materialize the incoming rows with OPENJSON when enabled. */

code_symbol_inventory_update_file_metada.postgresqlSql: UPDATE inventory.code_files SET sha256 = %s::text, line_count = %s::integer, symbol_count = %s::integer, content_text = %s::text WHERE code_file_id = %s::uuid RETURNING code_file_id
code_symbol_inventory_update_file_metada.sqlServerSql: UPDATE inventory.code_files SET sha256 = ?, line_count = ?, symbol_count = ?, content_text = ? WHERE code_file_id = ?
